chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1529 of 2017 Const. Petition No.D-1530 of 2017 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 1414/24 3.For hearing of CMA 9583/17 4.For hearing of main case 07-08-2024 Mr. Tarique G. Hanif Mangi, Advocate for petitioners in both matters. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G-Sindh. ***** Counsel for private respondents namely Mr. Muhammad Yakoob Soomro is once again called absent, who in fact had appeared on 17.05.2023 after having been imposed cost of Rs. 5000/- vide order dated 02.05.2023. These matters are pending as long as 2017 and heard at length with the assistance from learned AAG and these being quite complex matters, we have reached to the conclusion that when there are rival claims between the private parties dated back in the year 1966, the appropriate legal course would be to set aside all orders except order dated 19.03.2009, when matters were remanded back to learned Executive District Officer (Revenue), Khairpur (now Additional Deputy Commissioner, Khairpur) for hearing the parties and deciding the case in accordance with law. Let these proceedings commence de novo by issuing notices to all private parties as well as official respondents and after hearing all the parties, let a just order be passed in accordance within law preferably within three months. Accordingly, these petitions stand disposed of in the above terms. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
